# canonical-vault

> Governing source of truth for the Lattice — a perception generation and constraint navigation architecture. This repo defines the cognitive governance framework, runtime specification, and operator recognition infrastructure of the Liminal Institute.

## Structure

- [Governance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/00_governance/): Constitutional authority chain, invariants, operator manual, empirical doctrine, Neuralese lexicon
- [System Manifest](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/00_system/manifest/): System-level manifest and sync contracts
- [Sovereignty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/01_sovereignty/): IP priority anchors, SICA-001, legal sovereignty declarations
- [Epistemic Substrate](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/02_epistemic_substrate/): Foundational epistemics, constraint mapping, failure vector doctrine
- [Vault Pipeline](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/03_vault_pipeline/): Append-only ledger spec, vault chain, lineage protocol
- [System Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/04_system_spec/): Unified Spec, IDE→CCE→CFC→SBM→Governance→Vara pipeline architecture
- [Runtime](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/05_runtime/): VARA_SPEC_1.0, VARA_SCHEMA_1.0, vara.py CLI entry point, signal decomposition
- [IP / Legal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/06_ip_legal/): Credential storage spec (VCS-1.0), IP filings, legal layer
- [Content Engine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/07_content_engine/): Weekly content pipeline, lineage-tagged artifact format, signals ledger
- [Operator CLI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/08_operator/cli/): Operator-facing tooling and command interfaces
- [Boot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/09_boot/lattice_boot/): Lattice boot sequence and initialization protocol
- [Simulation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/10_simulation/): Runtime simulation layer
- [Contracts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/contracts/): Operator contracts, engagement terms
- [Tests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/tests/integration/): Integration test suite (25 passed / 24 skipped)
- [Vault](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/vault/): Live append-only ledger entries
- [Versions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/versions/): Version history and changelog

## Key Documents

- [INDEX.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/INDEX.md): Master directory index
- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/README.md): Public-facing repo overview
- [VAULT_INDEX.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault/main/VAULT_INDEX.md): Vault ledger index
